generated_exposure.exposure_text: New report shows that our allies are taking advantage of our generosity. While we're spending billions on collective defense, some partners are cutting their own budgets. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that don't protect our interests. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
